title: [Calyx] Add attributes to Calyx ports.
body:
When emitting Calyx, interface ports like `go`, `done`, `reset` and `clk` must be marked using attributes like `@go`, `@done`, `@clk`, and `@reset`. Otherwise the Calyx frontend will automatically add new ports with those attributes attached to them.

You'd want to generate something like:
```
component A(in: 8, @go go: 1, @clk clk: 1, @reset reset: 1) -> (out: 8, @done done: 1) {
```

_Originally posted by @rachitnigam in https://github.com/llvm/circt/issues/1662#issuecomment-908079077_


For the emitter, we can simply hard-code these for components. I think it would be nice to create and attach these custom attributes within the Calyx Dialect as well. Given that a `ComponentOp` lists all Inputs/Outputs as arguments, I think we can attach these attributes directly to the arguments.
